_notes: Source: hemas-encounter (hospital-specific profile). Target: R4 base Encounter. Source is more constrained than R4: it has 3 custom error/warning constraints, 3 extensions, mandatory identifier slicing with admissionNumber slice, mandatory type/subject/participant/period/reasonCode/serviceProvider, and hemas-specific VS bindings. Going source→target (R4 base), all source-specific constraints are relaxed or removed. R4 adds no new constraints over source's explicit requirements.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: hemas-enc-1(error: finished status implies period.end required), hemas-enc-2(warning: emergency class implies priority required), hemas-enc-3(error: inpatient class implies location required). R4 base has no equivalent constraints.
Optional extension bedNumber[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target (R4 base defines no extensions).
Optional extension wardName[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target.
Optional extension attendingConsultant[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target.
Source identifier slicing removed in target: source defines pattern-type discriminator slicing on identifier; R4 base has no slicing on identifier.
Identifier cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
Identifier MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

Mandatory identifier slice admissionNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. Includes removal of sub-constraints: admissionNumber.type[min=1 MS pattern=CC(VN)], admissionNumber.system[min=1 MS fixed=https://hemas.example.com/fhir/sid/admission-number], admissionNumber.value[min=1 MS].
Encounter.type cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.

Encounter.type binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type) → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type). Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.
serviceType MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

serviceType binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/service-type) → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/service-type). Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.
priority MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

priority binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-priority) → target example(http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActPriority). Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.
subject cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
subject reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Patient profile; target R4 base allows Reference(Patient|Group). Different profile targets; target widens reference.
participant cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
participant MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
participant.type MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
participant.individual MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
period cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
period MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
period.start cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target R4 base has no min constraint on period.start (effectively 0..1). Min decreased from 1 to 0.
period.start MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
reasonCode cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
reasonCode MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
diagnosis MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
diagnosis.condition MustSupport removed on required element (R4 defines min=1 on diagnosis.condition): source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
diagnosis.use MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

diagnosis.use binding strength weakened: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/diagnosis-role) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/diagnosis-role). Same value set, binding strength weakened from extensible to preferred.
hospitalization MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
hospitalization.preAdmissionIdentifier MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
hospitalization.admitSource MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

hospitalization.admitSource binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/admit-source) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-admit-source). Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to preferred.
hospitalization.dietPreference MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
hospitalization.dischargeDisposition MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.

hospitalization.dischargeDisposition binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/discharge-disposition) → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-discharge-disposition). Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.
location MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
location.location MustSupport removed on required element (R4 defines min=1 on location.location): source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
location.status MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
serviceProvider cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
serviceProvider MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base has no mustSupport.
serviceProvider reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Organization profile; target R4 base allows Reference(Organization). Different profile targets; target widens reference.
